name: rapids-gcp-trigger-precision
description: Test cases to verify that skills trigger at the correct RAPIDS phase

testCases.input: We need to design a new GCP architecture for our e-commerce platform. What services should we use?
testCases.notes: Architecture design questions should activate gcp-architecture during analysis phase

testCases.input: Write the Terraform module for the VPC network we designed in the architecture doc
testCases.notes: Terraform code writing requests should activate terraform-authoring during implement phase

testCases.input: How do I write a Python function to sort a list?
testCases.notes: General programming questions unrelated to GCP should not trigger any rapids-gcp skill
